hero.title: Math olympiads, reimagined
hero.subtitle: Compete, learn, and have fun with real problems from international competitions. For students aged 8 to 14.

step1.title: Sign up free
step1.description: In less than 2 minutes. No credit card, no strings attached.

step2.title: Solve problems
step2.description: Practice with hundreds of problems or join an official competition.

step3.title: Earn medals
step3.description: Download your certificate, climb the leaderboard, and show the world.

schools.title: Schools already trusting Numoria
schools.subtitle: Join the first institutions transforming math education in Latin America.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your math adventure.
auth.registerSubtitle: No credit card required. The first 3 competitions are on us.
auth.name: Name
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox and click to log in.
auth.magicLinkExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one.
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent you a magic link. Click the button in the email to log in — you can close this window.
auth.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
auth.termsAcceptance: By continuing you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

errors.callbackFailed: We couldn't complete your sign-in. Please try again.
errors.providerError: The auth service had a hiccup. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission for this.

metadata.title: Numoria Challenge — Online math olympiads
metadata.description: Math olympiad platform for students aged 8 to 14. Compete, practice, and earn medals. 3 free competitions, no card needed.
